RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0030 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Priya Brown Date of Birth: 03/11/1989 SSN (tokenized): TKN-508146 Annual Income: $85,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $58,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN89364AL Nissan Leaf 2022 ICE New 29,000 Authorized Signature: Priya Brown
